raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX noticed a charge for {$3400.00} for airline tickets I didnt purchase they were purchased XX/XX/XXXX to fly on XX/XX/XXXX, I was at work on those days, so called Citi bank XXXX put it under investigation and removed the amount from my account. 
The next thing I noticed on my XXXX account is the {$3400.00} had been reversed and added.to my balance. 
I did call XXXX XXXX and they couldnt help, then Citi bank who told me the dispute was completed and the amount for the airlines was for me to pay. 
After going on line today I found the Citi bank messages section not easy to find and I should have completed and signed a letter by XX/XX/XXXX, and the response from XXXX XXXX which I dont understand. 
What can I do now I feel as if Im going to be left with this money to pay which I cant afford.
